videoSnippet.title: The Devil is in the Details || Wesley So vs Levon Aronian || The American Cup Superfinal 2026
videoSnippet.description:

So, Wesley (2753) - Aronian, Levon (2729) 
The American Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [04-01] 2026.03.09
C50 Giuoco Pianissimo

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Nf6 4.d3 Bc5 5.O-O O-O 6.Nbd2 d5 7.exd5 Nxd5 8.Re1 Nb6 9.Bb3 Bg4 10.h3 Bh5 11.Ne4 Be7 12.Ng3 Bxf3 13.Qxf3 a5 14.c3 a4 15.Bc2 Kh8 16.Nf5 Bf6 17.d4 g6 18.Bh6 Rg8 19.Ng3 exd4 20.Ne4 Bh4 21.Rad1 f5 22.Nc5 Re8 23.Nxb7 Qf6 24.g3 g5 25.Qh5 Rg8 26.gxh4 gxh4+ 27.Kh1 Rg6 28.Bxf5 Rxh6 29.Re8+ Rxe8 30.Qxe8+ Kg7 31.Rg1+ Rg6 32.Bxg6 hxg6 33.Nc5 Ne7 34.Re1 Nbd5 35.Ne6+ Kh7 36.Nxd4 c5 37.Ne6 Qxf2 38.Ng5+ Kh6 39.Rg1 Kg7 40.Ne6+ Kh7 41.Nf8+ Kg7 42.Nxg6
